subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast fled from strangers unto thy Lord, the All-Choosing! Know thou that every shadow is darksome save His sheltering shade [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استجار من الاغیار الی ربه المختار اعلم ان کل ظل یحموم الا ظله الظلیل و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
